item.title: “天啊，太可怕了”：五角大楼如何对人工智能战争机器上瘾
item.description:
即将出版的《Project Maven》一书节选揭示了美国如何将硅谷纳入其人工智能战争愿景，而这一愿景如今正在伊朗上演。

【原文：

An excerpt from the coming book Project Maven shows how the US enlisted Silicon Valley in its vision for AI warfare, now playing out in Iran.

】

item.title: 亚马逊计划将年度Prime会员日促销活动从七月移至六月举行
item.description: 据知情人士透露，亚马逊公司正将年度Prime会员日促销活动从七月提前至六月举行，此举改变了这一已成为电子商务经济重要组成部分的活动日程安排。【原文：Amazon.com Inc. is moving up its annual Prime Day sale to June from July, according to people familiar with the matter, shifting the schedule for an event that’s become a big part of the e-commerce economy.】

item.title: 詹妮弗·加纳零食公司上市后首份财报业绩下滑
item.description: 童趣农场公司股价下跌9.8%，这家有机儿童零食制造商在首次公开上市后的财报中预测，2026年销售增长将放缓。【原文：Once Upon a Farm PBC shares fell 9.8% after the organic kids snacks maker forecast slowing sales growth in 2026 in its first earnings report as a public company.】

item.title: 波斯湾巨型海底电缆项目因伊朗战争陷入停滞
item.description: Meta Platforms公司已暂停其在非洲扩大互联网服务的大规模计划，因中东战争导致该地区相关活动陷入停滞。【原文：Meta Platforms Inc. has paused part of a massive effort to expand internet service across Africa as the war in the Middle East freezes activity in the region.】

item.title: Adobe宣布首席执行官将离职，并给出令人失望的业绩预测
item.description: Adobe公司宣布，首席执行官尚塔努·纳拉延将辞去这家创意软件巨头掌门人的职务，此举源于市场对其能否在人工智能时代蓬勃发展的深切质疑。【原文：Adobe Inc. announced that Chief Executive Officer Shantanu Narayen will resign from his position atop the creative software giant in the face of deep skepticism about the company’s ability to thrive in the AI era.】

item.title: 假警察局与监狱般的牢房：柬埔寨诈骗基地内部揭秘
item.description:
精心设计的布景似乎旨在通过视频聊天让受害者相信，他们正在与执法部门对话。

【原文：

Elaborate sets appeared to be designed to convince victims over video chat that they were talking to law enforcement.

】

item.title: 标普考虑规则变更，或将加速SpaceX入选标普500指数进程
item.description: 知情人士透露，标普道琼斯指数公司正考虑修改企业加入标普500指数的规则，此举可能为SpaceX在首次公开募股后加速入选铺平道路。【原文：S&P Dow Jones Indices LLC is considering changes to rules governing how companies join the S&P 500 Index, a move that would potentially fast-track SpaceX’s entry after its IPO, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 阿根廷公布高于预期的通胀率，伊朗战争在即
item.description: 阿根廷2月份的月度和年度通胀数据均高于预期，此后伊朗战争导致油价上涨。【原文：Argentina’s monthly and annual inflation readings both came in higher than expected in February before the war in Iran put upward pressure on oil prices.】

item.title: Netflix确认将推出爆款电影《KPop驱魔人》续集
item.description: 网飞公司周四在X平台发文宣布，将为2025年动画音乐电影《KPop驱魔人》制作续集。【原文：Netflix Inc. will make a sequel to the 2025 animated musical film KPop Demon Hunters, the company said Thursday in a post on X.】

item.title: 布伦特原油收盘价突破100美元，创2022年8月以来新高
item.description: 布伦特原油收盘价首次突破每桶100美元大关，创2022年8月以来新高。由于数百万桶原油仍被困在波斯湾，导致石油市场遭遇史上最大规模的供应中断。【原文：Brent crude settled above $100 a barrel for the first time since August 2022 as millions of barrels remain trapped in the Persian Gulf, leading to the biggest oil market disruption in history.】

item.title: 加州关键输油管道停运，石油钻井商转用卡车运输
item.description: 加州中部石油钻井商因炼油厂停产及关键输油管道闲置导致产品销路中断，不得不采取耗时费力的替代方案——用卡车将原油桶运送50英里。【原文：Oil drillers in central California have resorted to the costly and cumbersome alternative of trucking crude barrels 50 miles after the shut down of a refinery and idling of a key pipeline cut off outlets for their products.】

item.title: Tether投资主管在主导多笔交易后即将离职
item.description: Tether Holdings SA首席投资官理查德·希斯科特宣布离职。他曾负责管理支撑该公司主要稳定币的巨额储备金，并主导了从足球俱乐部到人形机器人等领域的系列收购交易。【原文：Tether Holdings SA Chief Investment Officer Richard Heathcote, who oversaw the vast reserves backing its main stablecoin and a deals spree involving everything from soccer clubs to humanoid robots, is stepping down from his position.】

item.title: 白宫可能启动《琼斯法案》
item.description: 特朗普能采取哪些措施来抑制油价。【原文：What Trump can do to dampen oil prices.】

item.title: 道富银行观察到近两年来最强劲的美元买盘
item.description: 据道富集团称，随着中东冲突推升避险资产需求，机构投资者正以近两年最强劲的势头买入美元。【原文：Institutional investors are buying US dollars at the strongest level in nearly two years, as conflict in the Middle East drives demand for safe-haven assets, according to State Street.】

item.title: 加拿大电信公司Telus表示正在调查网络入侵事件
item.description: 加拿大电信运营商Telus公司表示，正在调查一起网络安全事件。【原文：Canadian telecommunications provider Telus Corp. said it’s investigating a cybersecurity incident.】

item.title: Tinder推出视频速配功能，深化人工智能整合
item.description: Tinder宣布推出多项应用更新——包括若干人工智能驱动的功能——标志着其最新尝试，旨在为关键的Z世代用户群体重振品牌活力。【原文：Tinder announced a handful of new app updates — including several AI-powered features — marking its latest attempt to reinvigorate the brand for the crucial Gen Z audience.】

item.title: 为何Live Nation诉讼案后演唱会门票仍将高价不降
item.description: 去年大型巡回演出的门票均价为132.62美元。【原文：Ticket prices for major touring acts averaged $132.62 last year.】

item.title: 科技巨头的人工智能野心如何助推借贷热潮
item.description: 过去几年间，美国科技巨头们在开发先进人工智能系统方面展开了代价高昂的竞赛，同时为蓬勃发展的初创企业提供计算能力。为实现这些目标，它们彻底改变了增长融资模式。长期依赖丰厚收入和股价上涨的谷歌母公司Alphabet、Meta Platforms等科技巨头，如今正通过大量借贷来构建支撑聊天机器人运行的技术。【原文：For the past few years, the largest US technology companies have been in a costly race to develop advanced artificial intelligence systems while at the same time providing computing power to a burgeoning field of startups. To chase these goals, they have radically changed how they finance their growth. Long reliant on rich revenues and share price increases, Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Meta Platforms Inc. and other tech giants now are borrowing heavily to build the technology that makes chatbots run】

item.title: 巴西大豆船货未通过检验，中巴贸易面临风险
item.description: 巴西作为全球最大大豆出口国，部分大豆货运未能通过该国自身的卫生检验，引发市场担忧——在对华贸易的关键时期，这可能导致供应链中断。【原文：Some soybean shipments from top exporter Brazil have failed to clear the country’s own sanitary inspections, raising concerns about potential disruptions at a crucial time for trade with China.】

item.title: 美国商品期货交易委员会就预测市场操纵行为发布首份指引
item.description: 商品期货交易委员会发布了针对预测市场的新指导方针，要求交易所开放某些可能易受操纵和内幕交易影响的市场前，须与监管机构进行沟通。【原文：The Commodity Futures Trading Commission issued new guidance for prediction markets, asking exchanges to engage with regulators before opening certain markets that might be vulnerable to manipulation and insider trading.】

item.title: 科技圈人士担忧Anthropic与五角大楼冲突引发寒蝉效应
item.description: 一些行业观察人士担忧五角大楼与人工智能开发商的争端可能引发的连锁反应。【原文：Some industry watchers worry about the fallout from the Pentagon’s feud with the AI developer】

item.title: 欧洲央行维勒鲁瓦警告私人信贷流动性风险
item.description: 法国央行行长指出，旨在吸引散户投资者的半流动性基金兴起，可能对基金管理人构成风险。蓝猫资本、黑石集团和贝莱德等知名机构已遭遇大规模赎回申请。【原文：The rise of semi-liquid vehicles meant to attract retail investors could pose a risk to fund managers as high-profile names like Blue Owl Capital Inc., Blackstone Inc. and BlackRock Inc. have received a wave of withdrawal requests, according to the Governor of the Bank of France.】

item.title: 巴西削减燃油税以抵消油价飙升，伊朗战争仍在持续
item.description: 巴西政府正采取措施保护消费者免受全球油价飙升的影响，通过削减联邦政府对燃料进口和销售征收的税费，同时对原油出口征收新税以弥补税收损失。【原文：Brazil’s government is moving to shield consumers from surging oil prices worldwide by cutting federal taxes on the import and sale of fuels, while introducing a levy on crude oil exports to offset the revenue loss.】

item.title: 洛杉矶港2月进口量增长3%，农历新年前夕货运量攀升
item.description: 2月份洛杉矶港集装箱吞吐量增长近3%，因进口商在农历新年之前抢购货物，届时许多亚洲工厂将暂停生产。【原文：Total container traffic though the Port of Los Angeles in February rose nearly 3% as importers brought in goods ahead of the Lunar New Year, when many Asian factories pause production.】

item.title: 软银支持的PayPay在8.8亿美元IPO后股价上涨19%
item.description: PayPay公司股票周四在美股首日交易中飙升19%，此前这家数字支付企业以8.798亿美元完成首次公开募股（IPO），创下日本企业十年内登陆美国股市的最大规模上市纪录。【原文：Shares of PayPay Corp. jumped 19% in its trading debut Thursday after the digital payments firm’s $879.8 million US IPO, the biggest listing for a Japanese company on a US stock exchange in a decade.】

item.title: 备受好评的希尔顿黑德岛拟发行3500万美元债券用于消防总部建设
item.description: 希尔顿黑德岛——这座位于南卡罗来纳州外海的历史名岛，以高尔夫运动和12英里长的海滨而闻名——正通过发行市政债券筹集资金，用于建造新的消防员总部。【原文：Hilton Head, a historic island off of South Carolina known for its golfing and 12-mile beachfront, is tapping the municipal bond market to fund a new headquarters for firefighters.】

item.title: 施罗德出售业务为富国银行等银行带来8300万英镑手续费
item.description: 富国银行、巴克莱银行和摩根大通将因参与英国资产管理公司施罗德的出售工作，分享总额8300万英镑（约合1.108亿美元）的佣金。【原文：Wells Fargo & Co., Barclays Plc and JPMorgan Chase & Co. will split £83 million ($110.8 million) in fees for their work on the sale of UK asset manager Schroders Plc.】

item.title: CF工业公司股价创历史新高，因伊朗战争风险升温
item.description: 随着中东冲突升级威胁全球氮基作物营养素供应，化肥市场正趋紧，推动全球最大氨生产商CF工业控股公司等企业受益。【原文：Fertilizer markets are tightening as the escalating conflict in the Middle East threatens global supplies of nitrogen-based crop nutrients, boosting companies such as CF Industries Holdings Inc., the world’s largest producer of ammonia.】

item.title: 谢恩鲍姆承诺在选举改革失败后再次尝试
item.description: 墨西哥总统克劳迪娅·谢恩鲍姆在宪法修正案未能获得通过所需票数、遭遇其执政以来的首次立法挫折后不到24小时，便提出了一项改革选举制度的备选方案。【原文：President Claudia Sheinbaum offered a back up plan to reform Mexican elections less than 24 hours after a constitutional overhaul failed to win the votes needed for passage and marking her first legislative setback.】

item.title: 特朗普与伊朗态度强硬，油市难见缓解
item.description: 在战争第13天，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普与伊朗新任最高领袖均采取强硬姿态，尽管美国正加紧努力抑制油价，但布伦特原油价格仍一度突破每桶100美元，能源市场未见明显缓解。【原文：President Donald Trump and Iran’s new supreme leader both struck defiant tones on the 13th day of the war, offering little relief to energy markets as Brent crude briefly topped $100 barrel despite fresh US efforts to curb oil prices.】
